meaning: 戈斯波特[英国英格兰南部港市];n.(飞机座舱间的)通话软管
examples: Also at the meeting was Gosport Conservative MP Caroline Dinenage, Mrs Lee's local member of Parliament.
New zones were announced at sites including Cheshire, Essex, Cornwall, Gosport, Hereford and Humber Estuary.
The Tories also lost Gosport to no overall control, with the Lib Dems making gains.
